text: Competitive swimming has 4 strokes: freestyle (fastest, front crawl), backstroke (only stroke swum on back), breaststroke (slowest, simultaneous arm/leg motion), butterfly (most demanding, simultaneous overhead arm recovery). Medley: individual (one swimmer all 4) or relay (4 swimmers, each one stroke).
Freestyle: alternate arm pulls, flutter kick, breathing to side every 2-3 strokes.
Butterfly: dolphin kick, both arms recover over water simultaneously — Michael Phelps' signature stroke.
